issue.title: Heartbeat refill lane 1389: remaining Python asset sweep 9/10

commands: find src/bigclaw tests scripts bigclaw-go/scripts -type f -name '*.py' 2>/dev/null | sort

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-1389 changes.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python asset inventory and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.
Baseline HEAD before lane changes was `c5450aef`.
The first push attempt was rejected because origin/main advanced; the lane was rebased cleanly onto `2ad75a0d` and revalidated.
A metadata-only follow-up commit also required rebase onto `ea03f42d`; use `git log --oneline --grep 'BIG-GO-1389' -n 2` for the final lane commit chain.
